case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. EDVIN S. JUAREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $125.00) SERVED SEP-02-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,055.65 AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-14-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DIANA PERDOMO--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS--CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, EDVIN S.
